# themes/dark.py - Dark Theme

Dark color scheme.

---

## Theme: `dark`

A dark theme with light text on dark backgrounds.

### Colors

| Slot | Color |
|------|-------|
| `bg` | Dark gray |
| `fg` | White |
| `label.fg` | Light gray |
| `button.bg` | Dark blue |
| `button.fg` | White |
| `button.focused.bg` | Blue |
| `input.bg` | Dark gray |
| `input.fg` | White |
| `input.focused.bg` | Dark blue |
| `window.bg` | Dark gray |
| `window.border` | Gray |
| `dialog.bg` | Dark gray |

### Usage

```python
app = App(theme="dark")
```
